overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic cyberpunk city street with towering glass buildings, neon advertisements, and palm trees. The player walks along an elevated walkway through a commercial plaza and into a narrow trash-filled alley, eventually discovering a body near dumpsters at a dead end. High-quality game engine footage with a fisheye lens effect.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic elevated walkway lined with palm trees and modern skyscrapers. The camera approaches and focuses on a security camera mounted on the railing before continuing forward. The area is devoid of pedestrians, showcasing the cyberpunk architecture and neon signage.

The camera passes metal benches and a vendor standing near a WAGAMI MARKET stall. The black metal railing continues along the right side while palm trees recede into the background.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a covered plaza area with more pedestrians present, including someone walking toward the camera and another sitting on a bench. The environment features large trees in concrete planters and a modern glass building entrance. The camera then turns left into a narrower passage.

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a narrow enclosed alley with concrete walls and accumulated trash bags. The camera passes concrete benches where a person sits against the wall. The space feels more confined with limited sky visibility compared to the open plaza.

segments.scene_description: The final segment reaches a dead end in the alley with industrial dumpsters and a concentrated pile of trash. The camera discovers a body lying face down on the concrete near the dumpsters. The area is dimly lit with a metal fence visible on the left, creating a grim atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a pristine, futuristic walkway into the grim depths of a secluded urban alley. It begins by gliding past palm trees and towering skyscrapers, momentarily focusing on a railing-mounted security camera before moving forward into a wide commercial plaza. As the camera passes red market stalls and metal benches, the open space shifts into a covered plaza filled with pedestrians and large concrete planters before turning left into a narrower passage. The environment then tightens into a confined alleyway where the bright neon architecture is replaced by concrete walls and piles of trash bags. Finally, the camera reaches a dimly lit dead end, moving past industrial dumpsters to reveal a body lying face down on the concrete.
